meaning: adj.[化]乙氧基的 含乙氧基的
examples: Two methods for optimizing the process of synthesizing 2-ethyl-4-ethoxy-6-hydroxypyrimidine were reported.
This paper reports the synthetic method for 1-bromo-1-ethoxy cyclopropane and the best synthetic conditions for hectogram production in the laboratory.
Through the peculiarity contact-coat, composes the ethoxy methylene propane dioic acid dio-ethylest which improves the quality and yield of the product.
